description: A PROBE MUST produce a PROBE_ACK from any peer that satisfies the requested capabilities
notes: This test sends a PROBE with no 'consumes' requirements so that any implementation MUST respond. If an implementation has no capabilities to advertise, it may omit provides; the key assertion is that PROBE_ACK is received.

steps.comment: No 'consumes' field — this node is happy to connect with any peer.
The implementation MUST respond with its capability advertisement.
